urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Lasha Qasim Ka Nazar Aya Hassan Yaad Aye - Seeing the Body of Qasim they Remembered Hasan
english translation text: LASHA QASIM KA NAZAR AYA WHEN IMAM HUSSAIN (a.s.) SAW THE BODY OF QASIMEnglish Transliteration
IMAM HUSSAIN (a.s) REMEMBERED HIS BROTHER IMAM HASAN (a.s) WHEN HE SAW THE BODY OF QASIM
IMAM HUSSAIN (a.s.) CRIED A LOT AS HE REMEMBERED IMAM HASAN (a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
Haye Qasim Na Tere Tukde Badan Ke Hote
Ro Ke Seene Se Lagaya To Hassan Yaad Aye
@HujjatELC
Lasha Qasim Ka Nazar Aya Hassan Yaad Aye - Seeing the Body of Qasim they Remembered Hasan
english translation text:
I WISH YOUR BODY HAD NOT BEEN CUT IN THIS WAY,
WHEN IMAM HUSAIN (a.s.) PUT QASIM ON HIS CHEST HE REMEMBERED IMAM HASAN (a.s.)

IMAM HUSSAIN (a.s.) PICKED THE PIECES OF QASIM’S BODY AND PLACED IT IN CLOTH,
HE TIED THE CLOTH AND REMEMBERED HASSAN

urdu transliteration text:
Fayz Shabbir Jo Qasim Ka Janaza Laye
Zakhmi Teero Ke Janaze Me Hassan Yaad Aye
@HujjatELC
Lasha Qasim Ka Nazar Aya Hassan Yaad Aye - Seeing the Body of Qasim they Remembered Hasan
english translation text:
WHEN IMAM HUSSAIN (a.s.) BROUGHT THE BODY OF QASIM,
HE REMEMBERED IMAM HASAN’S (a.s.) WOUNDED BODY COVERED IN ARROWS
